name: novaguard-sonic-demo
description: NovaGuard Nova Sonic Voice Bridge — AWS SDK v3 bidirectional streaming demo

scripts.tts: node index.js --tts "Units have been dispatched. ETA 4 minutes. Please stay on the line."
scripts.install-check: node -e "import('@aws-sdk/client-bedrock-runtime').then(m => { const c = new m.InvokeModelWithBidirectionalStreamCommand; console.log('✅ InvokeModelWithBidirectionalStream available in SDK v3'); }).catch(e => console.error('❌', e.message))"

author: NovaGuard Team
